00020 
00021 package jelatine.cldc.io.socket;
00022 
00023 import java.io.DataInputStream;
00024 import java.io.DataOutputStream;
00025 import java.io.IOException;
00026 import java.io.InputStream;
00027 import java.io.OutputStream;
00028 
00029 import javax.microedition.io.Connection;
00030 import javax.microedition.io.StreamConnection;
00031 
00032 import jelatine.cldc.io.Protocol;
00033 import jelatine.cldc.io.URL;
00034 
00037 public class ProtocolImpl implements Protocol, StreamConnection {
00038 
00039     private String host; 
00040     private int port; 
00041     private int socketId; 
00050     private native int open(String host, int port, boolean timeouts);
00051 
00052     private native int read(int id);
00053 
00054     private native int readBuf(int id, byte[] buffer, int offset, int length);
00055 
00056     private native int write(int id, int b);
00057 
00058     private native int writeBuf(int id, byte[] buffer, int offset, int length);
00059 
00060     private native int close(int id);
00061 
00062     public Connection open(URL url, int mode, boolean timeouts) throws IllegalArgumentException, IOException {
00063         String target = url.getTarget();
00064         int portStartIndex = target.indexOf(':');
00065 
00066         if (!target.startsWith("//") || portStartIndex == -1) {
00067             throw new IllegalArgumentException("Malformed URL");
00068         }
00069 
00070         host = target.substring(2, portStartIndex);
00071 
00072         try {
00073             port = Integer.parseInt(target.substring(portStartIndex + 1));
00074         } catch(NumberFormatException e) {
00075             throw new IllegalArgumentException("Malformed URL: bad port");
00076         }
00077 
00078         socketId = open(host, port, timeouts);
00079         return this;
00080     }
00081 
00082     public DataInputStream openDataInputStream() throws IOException {
00083         return new DataInputStream(new SocketInputStream());
00084     }
00085 
00086     public InputStream openInputStream() throws IOException {
00087         return new SocketInputStream();
00088     }
00089 
00090     public DataOutputStream openDataOutputStream() throws IOException {
00091         return new DataOutputStream(new SocketOutputStream());
00092     }
00093 
00094     public OutputStream openOutputStream() throws IOException {
00095         return new SocketOutputStream();
00096     }
00097 
00098     public void close() throws IOException {
00099        close(socketId);
00100     }
00101 
00104     class SocketInputStream extends InputStream {
00105 
00111         public int read() throws IOException {
00112             return ProtocolImpl.this.read(socketId);
00113         }
00114 
00121         public int read(byte[] b) throws IOException {
00122             return read(b, 0, b.length);
00123         }
00124 
00135         public int read(byte[] b, int off, int len) throws IOException {
00136             return ProtocolImpl.this.readBuf(socketId, b, off, len);
00137         }
00138 
00139     }
00140 
00143     class SocketOutputStream extends OutputStream {
00144 
00145         public void write(int b) throws IOException {
00146             ProtocolImpl.this.write(socketId, b);
00147         }
00148 
00149         public void write(byte[] b) throws IOException {
00150             write(b, 0, b.length);
00151         }
00152 
00153         public void write(byte[] b, int off, int len) throws IOException {
00154             ProtocolImpl.this.writeBuf(socketId, b, off, len);
00155         }
00156 
00157     }
00158 
00159 }
